title: Superb Warfare ReFabricated
description: Fabric port for Superb Warfare Mod
body:
# Superb FPS Experience in Minecraft now on Fabric

**SuperbWarfare** is a warfare themed mod with various guns, huge cannons and powerful vehicles.

**Features**

- Smooth Animations – Every gun features high-quality animations, from reloading to aiming, delivering an immersive shooting experience.
- Powerful Artillery & Explosives – Unleash destruction with a variety of heavy weaponry, from rocket launchers to the annihilator energy 
- Armored Vehicles & War Machines – Dominate the battlefield with tanks, helicopters, and other fully drivable war vehicles.
- Gun Perk System – Customize your playstyle with different weapon perks, enhancing damage, fire rate and more.

# WARNING

The Superb Warfare (SBW) is a Java Edition mod, and the mod's artistic assets (textures, models, animations) are proprietary to the development team, with all rights reserved. The development team has not authorized any other projects (especially the Bedrock version mod) to use the artistic assets of original mod (see https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-warfare). Any appearance of our mod's artistic assets in other projects constitutes illegal misappropriation. The development team strongly condemns any acts of infringement or theft and urges the responsible parties to immediately cease such infringing activities.

This mod HAS NO BEDROCK EDTION. DO NOT PAY FOR ANY SERVER OR PROJECTS RELATED TO THIS MOD.

We have turned on BLOCK DESTRUCTION by default from 0.7.0 version, be careful!

# FAQ

How to enable/disable explosion destruction

Edit your server config at (your save)/serverconfig/superbwarfare-server.toml. Set explosion_destroy to true/false.

Or use command /sbw config explosionDestroy true/false

Server crashed after installing this mod

SBW doesn't support Arclight server.

# Wiki (WIP)

[Superb Warfare Wiki (WIP)](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-warfare)

# Crowdin

[SuperbWarfare](https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-warfare)

# Installation

Requirements:

- Fabric 0.16.10 or above
- Fabric Loader 0.116.6
- Geckolib 4.7.5-1.21.1 or above
- Trinkets 3.10.0-1.21.1 or above
- ForgeConfigAPI Port 21.1.6 or above

You can also install Cloth Config 11.1.106-1.21.1 to change configs in-game.

# Discord

Join our unofficial port discord server!

[Click Here](https://discord.gg/v6a4qY7xUf)

# License

Codes: GUN GPL 3.0 https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.txt

Assets made by Superb Warfare Develop Team reserve all rights (see https://modrinth.com/mod/superb-warfare).

# <font color="yellow">⚠</font> <font color="red">UNOFFICIAL FABRIC PORT — ALPHA VERSION</font> <font color="yellow">⚠</font>

<font color="red">

**This is an unofficial Fabric port of Superb Warfare and is currently in alpha stage.**

**The mod may be unstable, some features from the original version may not work correctly yet, and bugs or crashes are expected.**

</font>
